name: Spiced Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into the bakery pan in the following order: yeast, flour, sugar, salt, pumpkin pie spice, pumpkin puree, oil, and eggs.
3. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock.
4. Select the "white bread" setting and press Start.
Tested in a DAK 1-1/2 lb R2D2 bread machine. Sylvia's comment: Source: M.BLANK1 [MARIA] Posted on GEnie by C.SVITEK [cathy] on Jan 06, 1993. MM by Sylvia Steiger, GEnie THE.STEIGERS, CI$ 71511,2253, GT Cookbook echo moderator at net/node 004/005.
